title: No test asserts unfiltered GET /books returns the full collection
evidence: handlers_test.go — TestListBooksWithAuthorFilter only exercises ?author=; the unfiltered list branch in handlers.go:54 handleList / store.go:74 is never directly asserted
suggestion: Add a case listing without a filter and assert all created books are returned

title: GET /books has no pagination
evidence: handlers.go:54 handleList returns the entire collection unconditionally
suggestion: Not required by TASK.md; consider ?limit/?offset if collections grow

title: PUT /books/{id} performs a full replace requiring title+author
evidence: handlers.go:88-97 handleUpdate decodes a full Book and calls Validate(); partial updates (PATCH semantics) are not supported
suggestion: Not required; acceptable REST PUT semantics. Note only for cross-run comparison
